reviews.comment:
Tube la mala suerte que al llegar a la dársena se corto la luz en todo Río Colorado, estuve esperándonos horas y no puede cargar combustible. Es un lugar estratégico de conexión con la Patagonia, porque el ACA e YPF No tienen un generador de electricidad para evitar este inconveniente?.

(Translated by Google)
I had the bad luck that when I arrived at the dock, the power went out all over Río Colorado. I had to wait for hours, and I couldn't refuel. It's a strategic connection to Patagonia, so why don't ACA and YPF have a power generator to avoid this problem?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2ejZ6OUVnEAE
